column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client

column.name: LAND1
column.description: Country Key

column.name: LANDK
column.description: Vehicle country key

column.name: LNPLZ
column.description: Postal code length

column.name: PRPLZ
column.description: Rule for the postal code field check

column.name: ADDRS
column.description: Formatting routine key for printing addresses

column.name: XPLZS
column.description: Flag: Street address postal code required entry?

column.name: XPLPF
column.description: Flag: PO Box postal code required?

column.name: SPRAS
column.description: Language Key

column.name: XLAND
column.description: Country version flag

column.name: XADDR
column.description: Flag: Print country name in foreign addresses?

column.name: NMFMT
column.description: Standard name format

column.name: XREGS
column.description: Flag: City file address check

column.name: XPLST
column.description: Flag: Street-specific postal code? (City file)

column.name: INTCA
column.description: Country ISO code

column.name: INTCA3
column.description: ISO country code 3 char

column.name: INTCN3
column.description: ISO Country Code Numeric 3-Characters

column.name: XEGLD
column.description: Indicator: European Union Member?

column.name: XSKFN
column.description: Indicator: Discount base amount is the net value

column.name: XMWSN
column.description: Indicator: Base amount for tax is net of discount ?

column.name: LNBKN
column.description: Bank account number length

column.name: PRBKN
column.description: Rule for checking bank account number field

column.name: LNBLZ
column.description: Bank number length

column.name: PRBLZ
column.description: Rule for checking bank number field

column.name: LNPSK
column.description: Post office bank current account number length

column.name: PRPSK
column.description: Rule for checking postal check account number field

column.name: XPRBK
column.description: Indicator: Use check module for bank fields ?

column.name: BNKEY
column.description: Name of the bank key

column.name: LNBKS
column.description: Length of Bank Key

column.name: PRBKS
column.description: Rule for checking bank key field

column.name: XPRSO
column.description: Indicator: Use check module for tax fields etc. ?

column.name: PRUIN
column.description: Rule for checking VAT registration number field

column.name: UINLN
column.description: VAT registration number length

column.name: LNST1
column.description: Permitted Input Length for Tax Numbre 1

column.name: PRST1
column.description: Rule for checking tax code 1 field

column.description: Permitted Input Length for Tax Number 2

column.name: PRST2
column.description: Rule for checking tax code 2 field

column.description: Permitted Input Length for Tax Number 3

column.name: PRST3

column.name: LNST5
column.description: Permitted Input Length for Tax Number 5

column.name: PRST5
column.description: Rule for checking tax code 5 field

column.description: DUEVO: Nationality

column.name: KALSM
column.description: Procedure (Pricing, Output Control, Acct. Det., Costing,...)

column.name: LANDA
column.description: Alternative Country Key

column.name: WECHF
column.description: Payment period for bill of exchange

column.name: LKVRZ
column.description: Short Name for Foreign Trade Statistics

column.name: INTCN
column.description: Intrastat Code

column.name: XDEZP
column.description: Decimal point format

column.name: DATFM
column.description: Date Format

column.name: CURIN
column.description: Currency Key of the Index-Based Currency

column.name: CURHA
column.description: Currency Key of the Hard Currency

column.name: WAERS
column.description: Country currency

column.name: KURST
column.description: Exchange Rate Type for Translation into Country Currency

column.name: AFAPL
column.description: Chart of Depreciation for Asset Valuation

column.name: GWGWRT
column.description: Maximum low-value asset amount

column.name: UMRWRT
column.description: Net book value for changeover of depreciation method

column.name: KZRBWB
column.description: Indicator post net book value for retirement

column.name: XANZUM
column.description: Indicator transfer down payments from previous years

column.name: CTNCONCEPT
column.description: Withholding tax certificate numbering: Concepts

column.name: KZSRV
column.description: Taxes at individual service level

column.description: Indicator: Display Capital Goods Indicator?

column.name: XGCCV
column.description: Indicator: GCC Countries Member?

column.name: SUREG
column.description: Super region per country

column.description: Country grouping for shipping schedule
